mapper.insert:
SELECT 'ANN' || LPAD( NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_REPLACE(ann_no, '[^0-9]', ''))), 0) + 1 , 4, '0') FROM center_ann_board_post
INSERT INTO center_ann_board_post ( /*kr.or.ddit.domain.central.admin.mapper.AnnRegisterMapper.insertAnn*/ ann_no , board_no , ttl , cn , pblanc_bgng_dt , pblanc_end_dt , rcrt_bgng_dt , rcrt_end_dt , mvin_prd_dt , wrtr_id , reg_dttm , sbmsn_doc , del_yn , opn_yn , apt_cmplex_no ) VALUES ( #{annNo} , (SELECT board_no FROM center_board_instance WHERE apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo} AND board_ty_cd = 'ANN' AND ROWNUM = 1) , #{ttl} , #{cn} , TO_DATE(#{pblancBgngDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') , TO_DATE(#{pblancEndDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') , TO_DATE(#{rcrtBgngDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') , TO_DATE(#{rcrtEndDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') , TO_DATE(#{mvinPrdDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') , #{wrtrId} , SYSDATE , #{sbmsnDoc} , 'N' , 'Y' , #{aptCmplexNo} )
mapper.sql: FROM apt_complex ac INNER JOIN apt_ho_ty aht ON ac.apt_cmplex_no = aht.apt_cmplex_no INNER JOIN apt_detail ad ON ad.ho_ty_no = aht.ho_ty_no INNER JOIN rent_listing rl ON rl.ho_no = ad.ho_no WHERE rl.rcrt_lstg_stts_cd = 'GENERAL'
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT ac.sido_nm
AND ac.sido_nm IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ac.sido_nm

SELECT DISTINCT ac.sigungu_nm
AND ac.sido_nm = #{sidoNm} AND ac.sigungu_nm IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ac.sigungu_nm

SELECT aht.ho_ty_no ,aht.ty_nm ,aht.exclusive_size ,aht.room_cnt ,aht.bathroom_cnt ,COUNT(ad.ho_no) AS unit_cnt FROM apt_ho_ty aht LEFT JOIN apt_detail ad ON ad.ho_ty_no = aht.ho_ty_no WHERE aht.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo} GROUP BY aht.ho_ty_no , aht.ty_nm , aht.exclusive_size , aht.room_cnt , aht.bathroom_cnt

/*kr.or.ddit.domain.central.admin.mapper.AnnRegisterMapper.selectSbmsnDocList*/ SELECT DISTINCT rcd.sbmsn_doc_ty_cd , cc.code_name FROM rent_ctrt_doc rcd INNER JOIN common_code cc ON rcd.sbmsn_doc_ty_cd = cc.code_no_cd AND cc.group_code_no = 'SUBMIT_DOC_TY' WHERE rcd.rent_lstg_no IN
#{rentLstgNo}

/*kr.or.ddit.domain.central.admin.mapper.AnnRegisterMapper.selectRentList*/ SELECT rl.rent_lstg_no ,au.dong_nm ,ad.ho ,aht.ho_ty_no ,aht.ty_nm ,aht.exclusive_size ,aht.room_cnt ,aht.bathroom_cnt ,rl.dpst_amt ,rl.mthly_rent_amt FROM rent_listing rl INNER JOIN apt_detail ad ON rl.ho_no = ad.ho_no INNER JOIN apt_unit au ON ad.dong_no = au.dong_no INNER JOIN apt_ho_ty aht ON ad.ho_ty_no = aht.ho_ty_no WHERE aht.apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo} AND rl.rcrt_lstg_stts_cd = 'GENERAL' ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(NVL(NULLIF(REGEXP_REPLACE(au.dong_nm, '[^0-9]'), ''), '0')) , TO_NUMBER(NVL(NULLIF(REGEXP_REPLACE(ad.ho, '[^0-9]'), ''), '0'))
SELECT board_no FROM center_board_instance WHERE apt_cmplex_no = #{aptCmplexNo} AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO center_board_instance (board_no, board_nm, board_ty_cd, use_yn, apt_cmplex_no) VALUES (#{aptCmplexNo} || '_ANN', '공고게시판', 'ANN', 'Y', #{aptCmplexNo})
